Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Margarita Guzman To Perpetuate Testimony Rudolph Guzman By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Nov-02-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Garen Nazarian of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for petitioner / moving party Margarita Guzman

RULING:
PETITIONER MARGARITA GUZMAN'S PETITION TO PERPETUATE TESTIMONY RUDOLPH GUZMAN BY VIDEOTAPED DEPOSITION

No objection made and tentative ruling adopted: Margarita Guzman's petition to perpetuate testimony of Rudolph Guzman by videotaped deposition is granted in part and denied in part. The petition is denied as to Fred J. Early Jr. Company, Inc., Trans-Bay Engineers & Builders Inc. and The Parts House as there are no proofs of service on file demonstrating that those entities were served with the petition and received notice of the hearing. The petition is also denied as to Republic Supply Company because it does not meet the requirements of C.C.P. 2035.030(b) specifically as to that entity. The petition is granted as to all the other entities identified in paragraph 11 because the petition meets the requirements of C.C.P. section 2035.030(b) and does not violate section 2035.010(b). The petition demonstrates that the discovery requested may prevent a failure or delay of justice. (C.C.P. 2035.050(a).) The deposition may take place at or near Mr. Guzman's home in Stockton, CA. It shall be scheduled for a date at least 20 days after the November 2, 2016 hearing date. Order signed in open court. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Matter not reported (503/GLW)

MINI MINUTES:

Jason M. Rose of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / moving party Margarita Guzman

Duncan Lemmon of FOLEY & MANSFIELD (510-590-9500), appearing for defendants Cleaver Brooks and Republic Supply Company
Jasun C. Molinelli of ARCHER NORRIS (925-930-6600), specially appearing for defendant Moore Bros.

RULING:
PETITION OF MARGARITA GUZMAN TO PERPETUATE TESTIMONY RUDOLPH GUZMAN BY VIDEOTAPED DEPOSITION

Hearing held. The Court ordered continued Margarita Guzman's petition to perpetuate testimony of Rudolph Guzman by videotaped deposition to November 2, 2016 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 503. Defendants' request for supplemental responses is denied. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Reporter: Cindy Garis of AIKEN WELCH, CSR 402 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/GLW)
